activation_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Stage F Activation walks an approved envelope into the live operating state — every step is human-authorized, audit-emitted, and reversible by construction.
activation_defaults.model_usage_notes: Activation plans are DESIGN_NOT_EXECUTED. Real activation requires a future implementation slice that consumes this catalog. Enterprise-tier dual-control + break-glass + regulator-grade audit composes against existing GOVSEC.5 + ADR-0050 + ADR-0026 substrate.
audit_expectations: future ADMIN_ACTION:STARTER_ENVELOPE_ACTIVATED + per-step audit literals + dual-control audit lineage at the implementation slice

activation_plan.name: Enterprise Activation Plan
activation_plan.description: Canonical ordered sequence to activate the Enterprise Starter Envelope (envelope.enterprise.v1). Walks the fullest envelope at the Foundation runtime tier — multi-connector + multi-scope DMW + delegated authority profiles + dual-control on financial-effect ops + break-glass grant registry + LawfulBasis attestation surface + regulator-observable audit projection + custom retention + board observer scope. Dual-control invariants enforce two-admin authorization on financial-effect activation steps per ADR-0026.
activation_plan.human_readable_summary: Fullest activation: baseline + team + project + customer + regulator-observable DMW; Slack + Google connectors; delegated authority with dual-control; break-glass time-boxed grants per GOVSEC.5; LawfulBasis attestation surface; regulator-grade audit; custom retention; board observer scope.
activation_plan.model_usage_notes: Use this plan for the Enterprise plan tier. Dual-control activates on financial-effect steps (spend approval workflow template registration, advanced audit tier enablement at regulator-observable level). Break-glass grant registry is a designed surface — per GOVSEC.5 / ADR-0050 — that enables time-boxed emergency admin grants with mandatory valid_until and post-hoc two-person review.

activation_steps.step_purpose: Verify envelope DRAFT_NOT_ACTIVATED + caller admin capabilities + org match + dual-control coverage available.
preconditions: at least 2 ORG_ADMIN seats available for dual-control on financial-effect steps

activation_steps.step_name: Extend DMW to full enterprise scope set
activation_steps.step_purpose: Add team + project + customer + regulator-observable DMW scope extensions per the Enterprise envelope DMW_scope_ceiling.
activation_steps.produces_runtime_object: DMW scope extensions (team + project + customer + regulator-observable)
activation_steps.rollback_path: Soft-delete extension rows; emit DMW_ENTERPRISE_SCOPE_REVOKED per extension

activation_steps.step_name: Assign enterprise-tier roles (board + GC + GRC + CFO + cross-functional)
activation_steps.step_purpose: Register enterprise-tier role templates per W3 catalog Enterprise plan archetype.
activation_steps.rollback_path: Soft-delete assignment rows; emit ROLE_TEMPLATE_UNASSIGNED per row

activation_steps.step_purpose: Register delegated authority profiles per ADR-0080 Authority Map; enforce ceiling-never-exceeds-human per RULE 0.
postconditions: delegated authority profiles LIVE; ceiling-enforcement check audited per profile
activation_steps.rollback_path: Soft-delete authority profile rows; emit DELEGATED_AUTHORITY_REVOKED per row

activation_steps.step_name: Enable break-glass grant registry per GOVSEC.5
activation_steps.step_purpose: Enable the break-glass grant registry surface per ADR-0050 + GOVSEC.5. Mandatory valid_until per grant; mandatory post-hoc two-person review; no self-approval (GAP-C1 guard preserved).
activation_steps.produces_runtime_object: Break-glass grant registry flag on org_settings (no grants pre-registered)
postconditions: break-glass registry LIVE on org_settings; no pre-registered grants
activation_steps.rollback_path: Unset break-glass registry flag; emit BREAK_GLASS_REGISTRY_DISABLED

activation_steps.step_name: Enable LawfulBasis attestation surface per ADR-0036
activation_steps.step_purpose: Enable the LawfulBasis attestation surface per ADR-0036. Regulator-grade attestation chain available; ya29.*-or-equivalent regulator credentials NEVER stored in attestation records (env-var-NAME pattern).
activation_steps.produces_runtime_object: LawfulBasis attestation surface flag on org_settings
activation_steps.rollback_path: Unset attestation surface flag; emit LAWFUL_BASIS_ATTESTATION_DISABLED

activation_steps.step_purpose: Register SLACK_READ binding per C2 OPERATING. secret_ref env-var-NAME only.

activation_steps.step_name: Register Google Workspace read-first connector binding
activation_steps.step_purpose: Register GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_READ binding per C3 RUNTIME_READY. secret_ref env-var-NAME only.

Register 16 Stage 2 enterprise templates per W3 catalog (board prep, board finance packet, audit evidence gap, policy exception, security exception, contract review, incident followup, cross-functional blocker, exec commitment followup, vendor renewal, spend approval, expense exception, hiring pipeline risk, PR issue status, focus time protection, exec brief). Financial-effect templates carry dual_control_required_at_stage_3: true. This step requires DUAL-CONTROL authorization.
activation_steps.produces_runtime_object: Workflow template registrations (16 Stage 2 templates; all TEMPLATE_ONLY)
postconditions: 16 Stage 2 templates LIVE; workflow_state TEMPLATE_ONLY for every template
activation_steps.rollback_path: Soft-delete template rows; emit WORKFLOW_TEMPLATE_UNREGISTERED per row

activation_steps.step_purpose: Enable regulator-grade audit features — regulator-observable projection surfaces + extended retention + custom retention policy + per-permission audit emission + cross-scope verify-chain visibility. Composes against existing ADR-0002 baseline + ADR-0036 LawfulBasis. This step requires DUAL-CONTROL authorization (financial-effect on retention + storage costs).
activation_steps.produces_runtime_object: Regulator-grade audit tier flag + custom retention policy on org_settings
postconditions: regulator-grade audit tier LIVE; custom retention policy applied
activation_steps.rollback_path: Unset regulator-grade tier flag; emit REGULATOR_GRADE_AUDIT_DISABLED

activation_steps.step_purpose: Register board observer scope — read-only audit projection for designated board observers. Aggregate-only; no per-employee detail; no surveillance framing.
activation_steps.produces_runtime_object: Board observer scope row on org_settings
postconditions: board observer scope LIVE; aggregate-only projection enforced
activation_steps.rollback_path: Soft-delete board observer scope row; emit BOARD_OBSERVER_SCOPE_REVOKED

activation_steps.step_purpose: Register enterprise-tier aha-moment surface — first-week activation hints across Slack + Google + dual-control workflows + break-glass + LawfulBasis.
Final state-flip; emit STARTER_ENVELOPE_ACTIVATED with full lineage including dual-control audit references.
activation_steps.rollback_path: Walk steps 13 → 1 in reverse; emit STARTER_ENVELOPE_ACTIVATION_ROLLED_BACK at completion

audit_expectations: Every step emits exactly one audit literal BEFORE the underlying mutation per RULE 4
Every rollback emits an inverse audit literal AFTER the soft-delete row update
STARTER_ENVELOPE_ACTIVATED audit details include the ordered audit_event_id list from steps 1-13
Dual-control steps (10 + 11) emit *_DUAL_CONTROL audit literal; audit details include both approver audit_event_id references per ADR-0026
Connector binding registration audit details NEVER include the resolved env-var VALUE
Break-glass registry enablement does NOT pre-register any grants; only the registry surface itself
LawfulBasis attestation surface enablement does NOT pre-register any attestations; only the surface itself
Board observer scope enforces aggregate-only projection; per-employee detail in audit is absolutely forbidden
Regulator-grade audit tier composes against baseline; never replaces or weakens baseline

rollback_steps: On any step failure, walk preceding steps in reverse order
Each step's rollback_path is called; each emits the per-step inverse audit literal
Final rollback emits STARTER_ENVELOPE_ACTIVATION_ROLLED_BACK with failed step_id + partial lineage
Connector binding rollback NEVER attempts to revoke third-party tokens
Dual-control steps rollback emits the inverse *_DUAL_CONTROL audit literal with both approver references
Break-glass registry rollback NEVER auto-revokes any in-flight emergency grants; those follow their own valid_until lifecycle per ADR-0050
rollback_strategy.reversibility_guarantee: Activation is fully reversible by construction. Multi-connector + multi-scope + dual-control + break-glass + LawfulBasis rollback walks every step's rollback_path in reverse order; a partial activation state is impossible to leave behind. In-flight emergency break-glass grants (if any pre-exist) follow their own valid_until expiry path.

human_authorization_points.authorization_purpose: Confirm envelope ready to activate + dual-control admin seats available.
Confirm break-glass grant registry enablement per GOVSEC.5.
Confirm LawfulBasis attestation surface enablement per ADR-0036.
DUAL-CONTROL: Confirm Stage 2 enterprise template registration including financial-effect templates. Required before step 10 fires.
DUAL-CONTROL: Confirm regulator-grade audit tier enablement (financial-effect on retention + storage). Required before step 11 fires.

safe_defaults: Every step emits audit BEFORE the underlying mutation (RULE 4)
Every step's rollback_path is reversible via soft-delete (RULE 10)
Connector bindings registered with use_real: false at activation tier
Stage 2 templates remain TEMPLATE_ONLY at activation tier
Dual-control on financial-effect steps per ADR-0026
Break-glass registry enabled with no pre-registered grants
LawfulBasis attestation surface enabled with no pre-registered attestations
Regulator-grade audit composes against baseline; never weakens
forbidden_defaults: Auto-activation without ORG_ADMIN authorization is forbidden
Self-approval on dual-control steps is absolutely forbidden (GAP-C1 guard preserved)
Hard-delete of any activation row is forbidden (RULE 10)
Re-attempting a failed activation in-place is forbidden
Audit emission AFTER mutation is forbidden (RULE 4)
Resolved env-var VALUE in any audit detail / response / log / row is absolutely forbidden
Auto-flip to use_real: true is forbidden
Delegated authority profile exceeding the human ceiling is absolutely forbidden
Break-glass grant without mandatory valid_until is forbidden
Board observer scope per-employee detail is absolutely forbidden
Regulator-grade audit with weaker retention than baseline is forbidden
RULE 20 RULE/ADR modifications during activation are forbidden
